recommendations.title: The Truth About Love Is...
recommendations.overview: Dora, raises her two children with the help of her eccentric family, free-spirited best friend, and a charming poet-turned- nanny.

recommendations.title: O Concurso
recommendations.overview: Four candidates for a federal judge position embark on a madcap, no-holds-barred race to outdo one another, each committing his own brand of mayhem.

recommendations.title: Crazy Rich Asians
recommendations.overview: An American-born Chinese economics professor accompanies her boyfriend to Singapore for his best friend's wedding, only to get thrust into the lives of Asia's rich and famous.

recommendations.title: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: A man's life is turned inside out after a visit from his college friend leads him into the unexpected.

recommendations.title: Zombeavers
recommendations.overview: College friends find their weekend of sex and debauchery ruined when deadly zombie beavers swarm their riverside cabin.

recommendations.title: Treasure Hunters: On the Tracks of Khufu
recommendations.overview: An eccentric archaeologist goes on an unexpected journey to find King Khufu's lost treasure with his daughter and grandson.

recommendations.title: Believer 2
